allow: Bash(powershell -Command "& ''sqlcmd'' -S ''localhost'' -E -Q ''SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = N''''PharmaBill''''; SELECT name FROM sys.sql_logins WHERE name = N''''pharmabill'''';''")

Bash(powershell -Command "& sqlcmd -S ''localhost'' -E -d PharmaBill -Q ""SELECT name, TYPE_NAME\(user_type_id\) as type, max_length, is_nullable FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID\(''medicines''\) ORDER BY column_id;""")

Bash(powershell -Command "& sqlcmd -S ''localhost'' -E -d PharmaBill -Q ""IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID\(''bills''\) AND name = ''discount_percent''\) ALTER TABLE bills ADD discount_percent DECIMAL\(5,2\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;""")
